base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of overworld_map_alefgard — a tile (overworld_map) from 1986 dragon quest. Full overworld of Alefgard — continent with castles (Tantegel/Charlock), towns (Brecconary/Garinham/Kol/Rimuldar/Cantlin/Hauksness), forests, mountains, rivers, desert, island with Charlock. Iconic whole-world map as single image. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Full overworld of Alefgard — continent with castles (Tantegel/Charlock), towns (Brecconary/Garinham/Kol/Rimuldar/Cantlin/Hauksness), forests, mountains, rivers, desert, island with Charlock. Iconic whole-world map as single image
